changelog: Initial PropTech pain rule set for UK and Swedish property developers

stale_creative.business_pain: Ad fatigue driving CPL up, CTR declining
stale_creative.emotional_trigger: You're paying for impressions that stopped converting weeks ago

critical_ad_fatigue.business_pain: Severe creative fatigue — estimated 40-60% CPL increase vs fresh creative
critical_ad_fatigue.emotional_trigger: Every week this runs, you're paying more per lead than your competitors

recently_stopped_ads.business_pain: Advertising paused — likely budget pressure or pre-relaunch gap
recently_stopped_ads.emotional_trigger: Competitors kept running while your pipeline went quiet

static_floor_plans.business_pain: Buyers cannot explore the space — lower reservation confidence
static_floor_plans.emotional_trigger: Static floor plans lose buyers to developers who let them walk the space digitally

no_virtual_tour.business_pain: Off-plan buyers cannot experience the project — slower reservation velocity
no_virtual_tour.emotional_trigger: Buyers are reserving competitor units they can walk through online at 11pm

enquire_cta_no_reservation.business_pain: Every enquiry requires a human response — team bottleneck at volume
enquire_cta_no_reservation.emotional_trigger: Your sales team is answering the same 6 questions on repeat instead of closing

no_digital_reservation.business_pain: No digital commitment mechanism — serious buyers have no way to secure off-plan
no_digital_reservation.emotional_trigger: Buyers who are ready to commit have nowhere to go at midnight on a Sunday

no_chat_automation.business_pain: Inbound leads handled manually — response lag kills conversion
no_chat_automation.emotional_trigger: High-intent buyers who don't get a response in under 5 minutes buy elsewhere

poa_pricing.business_pain: Price opacity creates friction — buyers disengage before making contact
poa_pricing.emotional_trigger: Buyers who won't call for a price are your buyers — they just went to a competitor

slow_site.business_pain: Slow load time killing paid traffic ROI — every ad click bounces faster
slow_site.emotional_trigger: 53% of mobile users leave a page that takes over 3 seconds to load

no_facebook_pixel.business_pain: No retargeting data — ad spend has zero audience learning
no_facebook_pixel.emotional_trigger: Every visitor you pay for leaves without being retargetable

not_portal_listed.business_pain: Not discoverable by 90% of active property buyers
not_portal_listed.emotional_trigger: Buyers are searching Rightmove right now and your project doesn't exist to them

low_portal_quality.business_pain: Poor listing quality reducing click-through vs comparable developments
low_portal_quality.emotional_trigger: Buyers scroll past low-quality listings — you're invisible on the portal

high_days_on_market.business_pain: Stalled velocity — carrying costs mounting, investor confidence falling
high_days_on_market.emotional_trigger: Every week unsold is money bleeding from the project budget

pre_launch_no_data.business_pain: Unit mix decided without live demand data — full execution risk
pre_launch_no_data.emotional_trigger: Building the wrong thing in a new market is a multi-million pound mistake

new_geography_expansion.business_pain: Entering unfamiliar market without local demand intelligence
new_geography_expansion.emotional_trigger: New markets have different buyer profiles — gut feel from your existing patch doesn't transfer

poor_reviews.business_pain: Poor reputation actively losing buyers who check reviews before reserving
poor_reviews.emotional_trigger: 3 out of 5 buyers read reviews before making contact — yours are costing you leads

low_review_response_rate.business_pain: Unanswered reviews signal an overwhelmed team to prospective buyers
low_review_response_rate.emotional_trigger: Buyers see unanswered negative reviews as a preview of how you'll handle their snagging list

stale_content.business_pain: Stale content signals inactivity — hurts SEO and buyer confidence
stale_content.emotional_trigger: A blog last updated 4 months ago tells buyers nobody's home
